get.summary: Fetch delivered to and read by all status of a message in a conversation.

parameters.name: licenseKey
parameters.description: License key to be used for fetching delivered to and read by all status of a message in a conversation in a project in an account.

parameters.name: appSecret
parameters.description: App secret associated with the license key used.

parameters.name: userToken
parameters.description: Token of the user who is fetching delivered to and read by all status for message.

parameters.name: conversationId
parameters.description: Id of the conversation containing message to fetch delivered to and read by all status for.

parameters.name: messageIds
parameters.description: Comma seperated list of ids of the message to fetch delivered to and read by all status for.

get.description: Fetch delivered to and read by all status of a message in a conversation in a project in an account.

get.summary: Fetch pending read status of a message in a conversation.

parameters.name: licenseKey
parameters.description: License key to be used for fetching pending read status of a message in a conversation in a project in an account.

parameters.name: appSecret
parameters.description: App secret associated with the license key used.

parameters.name: userToken
parameters.description: Token of the user who is fetching pending read status for message.

parameters.name: conversationId
parameters.description: Id of the conversation containing message to fetch pending read status for.

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: Id of the message to fetch pending read status for.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of users(for whom message read is pending) to be fetched.Allowed values are [1,20]

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of users(for whom message read is pending) to be skipped before fetching users(used for paging).

get.description: Fetch pending read status of a message in a conversation in a project in an account.

get.summary: Fetch read status of a message in a conversation.

parameters.name: licenseKey
parameters.description: License key to be used for fetching read status of a message in a conversation in a project in an account.

parameters.name: appSecret
parameters.description: App secret associated with the license key used.

parameters.name: userToken
parameters.description: Token of the user who is fetching read status for message.

parameters.name: conversationId
parameters.description: Id of the conversation containing message to fetch read status for.

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: Id of the message to fetch read status for.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of users(by whom message has been read) to be fetched.Allowed values are [1,20]

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of users(by whom message has been read) to be skipped before fetching users(used for paging).

get.description: Fetch read status of a message in a conversation in a project in an account.

parameters.description: Id of the message to fetch pending delivery status for.

parameters.description: Number of users(for whom message delivery is pending) to be fetched.Allowed values are [1,20]

get.description: Fetch pending delivery status of a message in a conversation in a project in an account.

get.summary: Fetch delivery status of a message in a conversation.

parameters.name: licenseKey
parameters.description: License key to be used for fetching delivery status of a message in a conversation in a project in an account.

parameters.name: appSecret
parameters.description: App secret associated with the license key used.

parameters.name: userToken
parameters.description: Token of the user who is fetching delivery status for message.

parameters.name: conversationId
parameters.description: Id of the conversation containing message to fetch delivery status for.

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: Id of the message to fetch delivery status for.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of users(to whom message has been delivered) to be fetched.Allowed values are [1,20]

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of users(to whom message has been delivered) to be skipped before fetching users(used for paging).

Error_403_send_typing_message.title: Error_403_send_typing_message

error.description: The message of the error raised.

Error_403_send_typing_message.description: errorCode- 0 => Allowed messages limit exceeded, 1 => Typing events disabled for conversation, 2 => Allowed messages limit shall be exceeded, 3 => Sender is blocked, 11 => Account not verified yet, 12 => Account has been suspended, 13 => Invalid account status, 14 => Billing subscription not added, 15 => Billing subscription expired or not renewed or canceled, 16 => Invalid project status, 17 => Billing subscription expired.

Error_404_mark_message_as_delivered.title: Error_404_mark_message_as_delivered

error.description: The message of the error raised.

Error_404_mark_message_as_delivered.description: errorCode- 0 => licenseKey not found, 1 => User not found, 2 => Message not found or user can't mark message as delivered.

userProfileImageUrl.description: Profilepic associated with the given user.

metaData.description: Object containing metadata of the user, if any.

lastSeen.description: Epoch time at which user was last seen online.Value is -1 incase user is online now
